title: Helix CLI Documentation Content Module
description: Tour of the canonical CLI documentation content module and its package.json exports configuration

steps.title: Content module export
steps.description: The cliDocsContent export is a pure-data object (zero imports) containing structured documentation. The shape {id, title, content, order, keywords} matches what helix-global-client's DocSection type expects (minus the audience field, which the consumer assigns).

steps.title: Markdown content string
steps.description: The content field is a complete markdown document covering: Installation, Setup & Authentication, Common Commands (with flag tables), Worked Examples (8 examples for all required commands), Updating, and Troubleshooting. All flags were verified against the actual CLI source code.

steps.title: Exports map for subpath import
steps.description: The exports field exposes './docs' so consumers can import { cliDocsContent } from '@projectxinnovation/helix-cli/docs'. The types condition comes first per TypeScript convention, and only the import condition is used since this is an ESM-only package.
